description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a broad, arching headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The ear cups are circular and appear to be well-padded for comfort, with a smooth, slightly iridescent finish in shades of purple and blue. The headband is sturdy and connects seamlessly to the ear cups, suggesting a robust construction. The headphones have a modern, streamlined design with no visible wires, indicating they may be wireless. The overall build appears ergonomic, designed to fit comfortably over the head and ears. The surface is glossy and reflective, giving the headphones a premium, high-tech appearance.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with large, cushioned ear cups and a glossy, iridescent purple-blue finish. The design is sleek and wireless, with a sturdy, arching headband.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, circular ear cups and the full arch of the headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the slim profile of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the ear cups and the headband arch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the ear cup's depth and the headband's connection.
